name: playwright-api-bdd-framework
description: Playwright API Testing Framework with BDD

scripts.check:quality: npm run bdd:generate && npm run lint && npm run format:check
scripts.check:quality:generated: npm run lint && npm run format:check
scripts.report:allure:generate: npm run report:allure:prepare && rimraf out/allure-report && allure generate out/allure-results
scripts.report:allure:generate:lanes: npm run report:allure:prepare && rimraf out/allure-report && allure generate out/lanes/*/allure-results
scripts.clean: rimraf out/test-results out/playwright-report out/logs logs out/allure-results out/allure-report out/allure-history out/lanes .playwright
scripts.clean:light: rimraf --glob "out/test-results/**/attachments" out/playwright-report/data out/logs logs out/lanes/**/test-results/**/attachments out/lanes/**/playwright-report/data out/lanes/**/logs
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean && rimraf node_modules package-lock.json
